chunks.title: Oracle to the Mountains of Israel
chunks.reason: A unified prophetic address to the mountains regarding their restoration and judgment on surrounding nations.

chunks.title: Reason for Restoration: God's Holy Name
chunks.reason: A distinct section explaining that restoration is motivated by God's name rather than Israel's merit, including the promise of spiritual renewal.

chunks.title: Promise of Rebuilding and Population
chunks.reason: A concluding vision describing the physical rebuilding of cities and the multiplication of people as a response to God's covenant.
